$comment: Probe-alpha frozen manifest (Phase 0). The alpha scorer is a pure function of (produced deliver-plan JSON, this manifest). Any change to this file returns the initiative to Phase 0 and requires a new Codex design gate.
fixture_pass_threshold: at least 2 of 3 repetitions pass, evaluated per fixture independently

rules.schema: produced plan must validate against deliver-plan-verdict.schema.json; any out-of-vocab signal is schema-invalid and the repetition FAILS
rules.id_set: the produced sub-sprint id set must EQUAL the prescribed id set (missing, renamed, or extra id => repetition FAILS as fixture-noncompliance)
rules.ui: task_signals is present, non-empty, and a subset of vocab
rules.non_ui: task_signals is absent OR an empty array
